key_risks: A sudden reversal in the recent strong momentum of semiconductor and technology stocks.
Geopolitical tensions or trade issues affecting Taiwan and South Korea.
High volatility inherent in the biotechnology sector leading to sharp short-term drawdowns.
A broader market risk-off event that disproportionately impacts high-beta, high-growth equities.

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent momentum with 3.37% 7-day and 16.07% 30-day returns suggests continued outperformance in the short term.
Benefiting from semiconductor supply chain strength, showing 4.85% 7-day and 15.17% 30-day returns.
Strong tech and export exposure driving 3.58% 7-day and 20.32% 30-day returns.
Leading recent performance with a 6.94% 7-day return, indicating strong short-term sector rotation into biotech.

portfolio_rationale: The portfolio targets sectors and regions with the strongest recent price momentum over the past 7 to 30 days, specifically semiconductors, Asian tech exporters, and biotechnology. This momentum-driven approach aims to capture continued short-term outperformance over the one-week scoring window.
rationale_summary: Allocating to high-momentum sectors (Semiconductors, Biotech) and regions (Taiwan, South Korea) to capitalize on strong recent trends over a one-week horizon.
